title: I hired 5 AI agents. They work while I sleep.
post:
Last month, I hired 5 AI agents.

No job posts. No interviews. No benefits.

My research agent scans industry news every morning and summarizes what matters for my business. My writing agent drafts content based on my voice and style guide. My data agent monitors my metrics and flags anomalies. My outreach agent Personalizes cold emails at scale. And my coding agent handles smaller development tasks autonomously.

The wildest part? They don't get tired. They don't complain. They don't make excuses.

This isn't science fiction anymore. This is my actual workflow in 2025.

Has anyone else built an AI agent team? What's working for you?
